overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban alleyway at night. The scene features wet pavement reflecting cyan and magenta neon signs, food stalls, and scattered pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk market environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with food stalls and neon signage

agents.ego_description: character in blue jacket walking steadily through the narrow alleyway, passing food stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food stall counter under the green awning

entered.detail: food vendor stall with green canopy and illuminated menu displays
tall vertical neon signs with Japanese characters glowing purple and cyan
industrial metal walkway bridge crossing overhead with support beams
dark wet pavement reflecting the neon lights from surrounding signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, with the character walking forward past a food stall on the right. Neon signs with Japanese characters illuminate the scene in purple and cyan hues, while an overhead metal walkway structure looms ahead. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant lighting, and a vendor stands behind the stall counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional passage under overhead walkway bridge

events.description: passing under the overhead walkway bridge, ambient lighting decreases significantly
emerging from under the overpass, bright cyan neon lights become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the darker underpass section toward the brighter area ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: heavy industrial metal bridge structure with support columns creating a covered passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a heavy industrial overhead walkway bridge, causing the environment to darken significantly. The food stall falls behind as the alley opens slightly, revealing bright cyan neon lights glowing in the distance. A pedestrian in white walks ahead, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with prominent cyan neon tube lighting and vendor stalls

events.description: bright cyan neon tube lights overhead illuminate the entire alley section with intense blue-white glow
ground reflections become more pronounced under the intense overhead neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the bright cyan neon tubes, passing vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue shirt arranging items at a counter under the cyan lights

entered.detail: long horizontal cyan neon tubes running overhead providing intense blue-white illumination
illuminated vending machine with bright white screen displaying food items
scattered cardboard boxes and debris piled along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a section dominated by intense cyan neon tube lights overhead, casting everything in a blue-white glow. The wet pavement creates strong reflections of the neon. A vending machine with a bright screen stands on the left, while cardboard debris lines the right wall. The alley feels more enclosed with the bright overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley approaching metal gate barrier with maintenance vendor

events.description: character slows down while approaching the metal gate barrier at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the alley near a metal gate, observing the vendor sweeping

notable_agents.action: elderly vendor in brown coat sweeping the wet ground with a broom near the vending machine

entered.detail: metal barred gate blocking the end of the alley with vertical railings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a metal gate barrier at the alley's end. The intense cyan neon lights fall behind as the character slows down. An elderly vendor in a brown coat sweeps the wet ground on the left near a vending machine. The environment feels more industrial with the metal gate and trash bins visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk alley that transitions from a brightly lit market space into a shadowed industrial underpass. It begins by following a character walking past a food stall, where purple and cyan neon signs with Japanese characters cast vivid reflections across the wet asphalt. As the character advances, the scene shifts beneath a heavy industrial overhead walkway, causing the environment to darken significantly and the food stall to recede. The perspective then opens slightly as the camera moves out from under the bridge, revealing a pedestrian in white walking ahead toward bright cyan lights glowing in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched alleyway that shifts from an intense, enclosed glow toward a more industrial exit. It begins as the character enters a section dominated by overhead cyan neon tubes, which cast a stark blue-white light across wet pavement and a bright vending machine screen. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed feeling persists amidst cardboard debris lining the walls and strong reflections shimmering on the ground. The scene then opens up as the intense cyan lighting falls behind, shifting the focus toward a metal gate barrier and trash bins at the alley's end. Finally, the character slows down near an elderly vendor in a brown coat sweeping the wet ground, completing the transition into the industrial perimeter of the market.
